creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to Dimitry Andric from comment #1)

I will note that the ?= notation for CXXFLAGS
in sys.mk will do nothing if CXXFLAGS already has content.

My use of SRC_ENV_CONF instead of SRCCONF may create a
timing/staging problem since I assign to CXXFLAGS in the
file referenced.

SRC_ENV_CONF use may have restrictions that I was not aware
of and that might not be documented.

When I get a chance I'll try using SRCCONF to reference the
file instead.
